description: Migrate the Slack plugin to use SDK utilities: replace manual waitForAuth polling with waitUntil, replace manual localStorage.getItem with getLocalStorage, and replace manual globalThis access with getPageGlobal where applicable.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/slack && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace Slack manual waitForAuth with SDK waitUntil
userStories.description: Replace the hand-rolled setInterval polling in waitForSlackAuth() with the SDK's waitUntil utility. Replace manual localStorage.getItem calls with SDK getLocalStorage.
acceptanceCriteria: waitForSlackAuth uses waitUntil(() => isSlackAuthenticated(), { interval: 500, timeout: 3000 }) wrapped to return boolean
No setInterval or clearInterval calls remain in waitForSlackAuth
All direct localStorage.getItem calls replaced with getLocalStorage from SDK
Import for waitUntil and getLocalStorage added from @opentabs-dev/plugin-sdk
Plugin builds and all tools function identically
